children.name: About Description
children.characters: With generous frontage on a paved county road and all necessary utilities at the boundary, you can build your dream cabin, homestead, or weekend getaway with ease. Imagine sipping your morning coffee on a wrap-around porch as mist drifts through the valley below, or gathering around a firepit under a canopy of stars.
